ddls:
CREATE TABLE "computer_generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computer generation */,
  "begin_year" TEXT /* Approximate beginning year of the generation */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Approximate end year of the generation */,
  "dominant_look" TEXT /* Dominant look of computers during the generation */,
  "dominant_feel" TEXT /* Dominant feel or user experience during the generation */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Brief description of the historical context surrounding the generation */,
  "key_figures" TEXT /* List of key figures who contributed to the development of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processor_technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processor technology */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the computer generation */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the processor technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processor technology */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the processor technology */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the processor technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processor_technologies_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES computer_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_innovations" (
  "innovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory innovation */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the computer generation */,
  "innovation_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory innovation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory innovation */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the memory innovation */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Access time of the memory innovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innovation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_innovations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES computer_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "io_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each I/O device */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the computer generation */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the I/O device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the I/O device */,
  "input_method" TEXT /* Input method used by the I/O device */,
  "output_method" TEXT /* Output method used by the I/O device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_io_devices_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES computer_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibits" (
  "exhibit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibit */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the computer generation */,
  "exhibit_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exhibit */,
  "exhibit_type" TEXT /* Type of exhibit */,
  "exhibit_status" TEXT /* Status of the exhibit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibits_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES computer_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lesson_plans" (
  "lesson_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson plan */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the lesson plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lesson plan */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the lesson plan */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the lesson plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the quiz */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quiz */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "exhibit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exhibit */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_exhibit_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibit_id") REFERENCES exhibits ("exhibit_id")
)
